description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a modern, streamlined design. The headband is broad and smoothly curved, connecting two large, oval-shaped ear cups that are padded for comfort. The ear cups are predominantly black with a matte finish, while the headband and the outer shell of the ear cups are a contrasting light gray or silver color. The headphones appear to be wireless, as there are no visible cables or connectors, and the ear cups are thick enough to house internal electronics and batteries. The overall construction suggests a combination of plastic and synthetic leather, with possible metal reinforcement in the headband for durability. This type of object is commonly used for personal audio listening in urban environments, such as on public transport, in parks, or while walking on city streets.
description: A sleek, over-ear wireless headphone with padded black ear cups and a silver-gray headband, designed for comfortable personal audio use.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the full arch of the headband and both padded ear cups clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the ear cups and the streamlined profile of the headband.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the open, oval shape of the ear cups and the inner padding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the symmetry and construction of the headband and ear cups.
